hooks.command: echo '‚óÜ Spec-driven LOOP active (see LOOP.md). Changing behavior = a slice: spec‚Üíimplement‚Üítrace(@trace FR-id)‚Üíverify‚Üíreview(maker‚âÝchecker)‚Üícommit. Entry commands: /new-capability /verify /trace /review. A red gate is a STOP ‚Äî fix it, never bypass.
